spec_match.rationale: Accurately displays the interaction of three nested scrolling containers with separate configurable overscroll-behavior values.

interactive.rationale: Very interactive: features independent select buttons for three layers, active scroll logger panels, and live state descriptions.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Matches the parent description of nested inner/middle/outer scrollers.

edge_cases.rationale: Uses debounced scrolling timers (80ms) to avoid thread flooding, and applies updates dynamically.

references.rationale: The page contains see also reference links but completely omits the required external ChromeStatus link.

design_system.rationale: Applies gorgeous color styling guidelines to match scroller layer names (rose, emerald, blue labels) to their containers.

openQuestions.title: Cite ChromeStatus link under see also references
openQuestions.detail: Add the canonical link to https://chromestatus.com/feature/5176802466201600 in the see also references links section at the bottom of the page to follow showcase standards.
